description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.6 Docker image. Define a single stage named test (the default) and a job called test. In the test job run the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python-dev python-pip, pip install -r requirements.txt, and pytest tests. The job has no caches, artifacts, services, or special rules, so it runs on every pipeline.
